sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, randFisherF(5, 2));
UPDATE test_table SET value = randFisherF(10, 5) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, randFisherF(3, 7) AS random_value FROM test_table;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE value > randFisherF(1, 1);
